content.en:
Silent Black Sea.

Many Dao Ancestors have entered here, all looking for the Yuan Shen Drum, after all, killing the original antiquities can also obtain treasures, which is very rare!

After most of the primordial artifacts are killed, nothing can be gained.

If you kill the Primordial Ancients, you can also get the Primordial Ancient Beads, but the Primordial Ancients are too powerful, and they are too difficult to kill, and those Dao Ancestors don't dare to fight the idea of the Primordial Ancients.

However, the Genshin Drum is not powerful, and it is easy to kill.

Therefore, these Dao Ancestors dared to play the idea of the Yuan Shen Drum.

......

"According to the news, after staying in the Silent Black Sea for thirty Origin Domain Days, there is a chance to encounter the Yuan Shen Drum, and after staying for a hundred Origin Domain Days, there is a high probability that you will encounter the Yuan Shen Drum, but you will also encounter other powerful Primordial Antiquities, and you may even encounter the Primordial Ancients!"

After Ye Tian grasped this information, he slowly shuttled through the Silent Black Sea.

He wasn't near the boundaries of the Ancient Plains, those Dao Ancestors of the Ancient Dao Alliance were nearby, so he needed to avoid them.

Time passed slowly, and soon forty Primordial Days passed, and during this time, he also encountered other primordial artifacts, all of which he directly killed in seconds.

Finally this day.

In the silent Black Sea void in front of him, a huge black drum appeared.

"Genshin Drum!"

Ye Tian smiled, after waiting for so long, he finally waited for this Yuan Shen Drum.

Airplanes!!!

The Genshin Drum shook, and the sound of drums appeared in the void.

The shock formed by this drum directly acted on Ye Tian's body, wanting to shatter Ye Tian's body, but Ye Tian's body was too powerful, naturally it was not something that this Yuan Shen Drum could shake.

Once primordial antiquities such as the Genshin Drum appear, it is not easy to leave, and although they appear suddenly, it takes a certain amount of time to leave abruptly.

According to the speculation of the Dao Ancestors, this sudden appearance of the ability cannot be used all the time, and there is an interval between them.

Therefore, Ye Tian was not worried that this Yuan Shen Drum would suddenly escape.

Swish!

Ye Tian exerted endless speed, came to this Yuan Shen Drum, and used endless golden light to kill this Yuan Shen Drum in seconds.

Click!

The Genshin Drum shattered and dissipated, and a drop of black liquor appeared.

"Sure enough, there is black liquid!"

Ye Tian grabbed this drop of black liquor and put it away.

He then continued to stay in the Silent Black Sea, and for a long time.

If the other Dao Ancestors didn't dare to do this, they would return to the district boundary to rest for a long time, and they wouldn't even dare to enter the Silent Black Sea frequently, otherwise they would encounter very terrifying primordial antiquities.

Not long after, Ye Tian encountered the Yuanshen Drum again, and after killing the Yuanshen Drum, he obtained another drop of black liquid.

But as time passed, he spent some time in the silent Black Sea.

Finally, on this day, he encountered several primordial artifacts at once.

Buzz Buzz!!

There were three primordial ancients around, as well as five primordial drums, and other messy primordial antiquities in the outside world, a total of sixteen primordial antiquities.

The other primordial artifacts weren't powerful, but those three primordial ancients were in trouble.

It can be said that even if it is a Dao Ancestor in the late stage of the Sixfold Origin Ancestor, when he encounters this situation, he can only choose to escape.

However, Ye Tian was very happy.

"That's right, this time you can harvest three primordial ancient beads and three drops of black liquor!"

Ye Tian immediately started to do it, first killing the other primordial antiquities directly, and then dealing with the three primordial ancients.

Thundered!!!!

Under Ye Tian's attack, these three primordial ancients collapsed again and again.

Moreover, Ye Tian directly exerted the power of the Endless Yuan Dao rudimentary form this time, and after only six attacks, the primordial ancients directly fell.

If he comprehended the true Endless Yuan Dao, he would be able to directly attack the primordial ancients in an instant, even if their recovery ability was against the sky, they would not be able to withstand his blow.

One after another days passed, Ye Tian found that the number of Yuanshen Drums was getting smaller and smaller, and he couldn't even find the Yuanshen Drums after that, but the primordial ancients often encountered them, and the strength of the primordial ancients became stronger and stronger.

One day, Ye Tian directly encountered a primordial ancient whose strength was comparable to that of the late stage of the Sixfold Primordial Ancestor, and was even very close to the peak of the Sixfold Primordial Ancestor.

Moreover, such a primordial ancient, the recovery ability was too perverted, even if Ye Tian attacked with all his strength and smashed its body again and again, it took a long time to kill it.

And the quality of the primordial ancient beads in the body of this primordial ancient person is also better.

......

"Void White Dao Ancestor summoned me?"

Ye Tian accepted the interrogation, and only then did he discover that something big had happened.

"Endless Dao Ancestor, don't enter the Silent Black Sea again for the time being, something big has happened, a large number of Dao Ancestors have entered the Silent Black Sea, triggering a primordial ancient whose strength is comparable to that of a half-step sevenfold ancestor, five Dao Ancestors were directly killed in seconds, and a half-step sevenfold Dao Ancestor tried to intercept the other party, but was also injured and fled directly back to the district boundary. "

After receiving this information, Ye Tian first went back to the boundary of the Ancient Plains to send the resources back, and then entered the Silent Black Sea.

Anyway, he has several copy bodies, and even if he really falls, he can still copy them, so he doesn't need to be as fearful as other Dao Ancestors.

At the beginning, Ye Tian was lucky, and he didn't encounter the primordial ancients whose strength was comparable to that of a half-step sevenfold ancestor, but after a long time, he finally encountered it.

In the silent black sea void, Ye Tian's eyes were staring ahead, a terrifying black figure stared at him, a terrifying aura permeated, and all around him were suppressed by a dark force.

"It's very powerful, it's the most powerful primordial ancient I've ever seen!

Ye Tian was sure that the other party's strength definitely surpassed the peak realm of the sixfold primordial ancestor, and he was afraid that it was really comparable to the half-step sevenfold primordial ancestor realm.

Moreover, such a primordial ancient person was so difficult to kill, even the same half-step sevenfold ancestor could not kill it, but would be consumed by it.

This is also the reason why that half-step sevenfold ancestor fled to the district boundary, because he really can't kill this half-step sevenfold ancestor-level primordial ancient!

"Let's see how terrifying the strength of these primordial ancients is!"

Ye Tian and the primordial ancient man shot at the same time.

Rumble!!!

With just one blow, Ye Tian was directly knocked away by the opponent's punch, and the Endless Black Domain was directly torn apart, and even his Endless Light Shield was broken.

And Ye Tian's endless golden light also hit the other party's body, although a hole was torn, but this kind of injury was no different from ordinary people breaking a layer of skin.

Thundered!!!

The battle continued, and Ye Tian was in a weak position the whole time, completely suppressed.

"Sure enough, I am at most equivalent to a weak half-step sevenfold ancestor, and this primordial ancient person is equivalent to a powerful half-step sevenfold ancestor, and he is almost unable to die, I can't help him at all!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

After a long time, Ye Tian's replica body was seriously injured.
